CC Support Window — Floor Bump (2.1.139 → 2.1.148)

Issue #1945 · ladder capstone · SoT: shared/cc-support.json

The single source of truth is supported_floor in cc-support.json; stamp-cc-support.mjs propagates it to MIN_CC_VERSION, CLAUDE.md, and the doctor doc, and a STRICT test requires every SKILL.md floor ≥ it. Drag the floor to see who's dropped and what the derived files become. #1945 sets it to 2.1.148 (the Bash exit-127 correctness fix).

2.1.148
—
versions supported
—
versions dropped
111
SKILL.md floors bumped


  
Self-contained — no network. Mirrors the cc-support.json → stamp-cc-support.mjs propagation
    and tests/manifests/test-cc-version-floor.sh STRICT skill-floor check.
